name: Dead Argonian Agent
bio:
Physical Appearance: Argonian male. Wears leather boots, greaves, cuirass and gauntlets. Wields a silver dagger.
Race: Argonian
Personality Keywords: Unknown
Role: This agent was sent by the Argonian Royal Court to assassinate Scar-Tail for the crime of fleeing Black Marsh and refusing to fulfill his duties as a royal assassin - an act of treason punishable only by execution. The agent managed to wound Scar-Tail during their confrontation but was killed in the process. His heart can be extracted from his body.
Home Location Information: Unknown
Daily Routine: The Dead Argonian Agent does not have a daily routine as he is found dead when encountered.
author: Bethesda
